message:
fix(harness): normalize bisect replay manifest test seed to 42 and add verification summary artifact

- Change replay_seed in bd_mblr_7_6_1_bisect_replay_manifest test from
  424242 to 42 for consistency with the project's standard test seed
- Add verification_summary.json to the bisect replay manifest e2e artifact
  bundle (bd-mblr.7.6.1-seed-424242)
- Update debug_log.jsonl with latest contract verification run

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
